message:
fix(tests): resolve failing auth and anthropic provider streams by decoupling virtual timeouts

- A previous commit added `timeout_info` bounding to `Response::text()`, which unintentionally triggered `asupersync`'s aggressive virtual time fast-forwarding during mock socket tests.
- Disabled HTTP request timeouts entirely within `#[cfg(test)]` context to allow local unit test mocks (like OAuth routines in `auth.rs`) to respond correctly instead of dropping instantly due to simulated clock drift.
- Aligned  and  assertions in `tests/e2e_failure_injection_recovery.rs` with the agent's new graceful error recovery patterns (`Result::Ok(StopReason::Error)`).
